description: Live tracking map with rider GPS (Feature 10), Product ratings & reviews (Feature 12), and Smart suggestions / frequently bought together (Feature 14).
steps: Update apps/web/components/tracking/delivery-map.tsx: Ensure the existing DeliveryMap component shows the rider's live GPS position with a marker that updates in real-time via SSE. Add route line from rider to customer destination. Add store marker. Show distance remaining text overlay. Use maplibre-gl (already installed) for the map rendering.

Update apps/web/components/tracking/live-order-tracking.tsx: The component already has DeliveryMap integration. Verify it correctly passes deliveryPartnerLocation to the map when status is OUT_FOR_DELIVERY or ARRIVING. Add auto-refresh of rider position every 10 seconds via the existing useOrderTracking hook (already using SSE). Ensure the map shows prominently during delivery phase.

Create apps/web/app/api/products/[slug]/reviews/route.ts: GET endpoint to fetch reviews for a product (paginated). POST endpoint to create a review (authenticated, must have purchased the product in a delivered order). Return average rating and review count.

Create apps/web/components/product-reviews.tsx: Client component showing star rating display, review list with user name/date/comment, and a 'Write Review' form (only visible if user has ordered this product). Show average rating prominently. Paginated review list.
Update apps/web/app/products/[slug]/page.tsx: Add the ProductReviews component below the product details. Fetch and display average rating and review count in the product info section.
Update apps/web/components/product-card.tsx: Show a small star rating indicator (avg rating + review count) below the product name if reviews exist.

Create apps/web/app/api/products/[slug]/suggestions/route.ts: GET endpoint that returns 'frequently bought together' products. Logic: find other products that appear in orders containing this product. Sort by co-occurrence frequency. Return top 6 suggestions.

Create apps/web/components/product-suggestions.tsx: 'Frequently Bought Together' horizontal scroll section. Shows suggested products with add-to-cart buttons. Displayed on product detail page and optionally in cart.

Create apps/web/app/api/cart/suggestions/route.ts: GET endpoint that accepts current cart product IDs and returns suggestions based on co-purchase patterns across all cart items. Deduplicates items already in cart.
acceptance_criteria: Delivery map shows rider's live GPS with route line and auto-refresh
Product reviews API allows creating and fetching reviews
Product detail page shows reviews section with star ratings
Product cards show average rating when reviews exist
Frequently bought together suggestions appear on product pages
Cart suggestions API returns relevant co-purchased products
verification: cd apps/web && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -20
